subcodes.first_line: O ye two who are firm in the Covenant! Your letter, which was a conclusive proof of your steadfastness and constancy in the Covenant, hath been received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما که برهان قاطع بر ثبوت و رسوخ بر میثاق بود رسید
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @firmness in the Covenant
